FindingPayload.description:
Canonical shared contract for one serialized finding payload.

Boundary serializers and HTTP models should import this TypedDict directly
so future field changes have one source of truth. It intentionally includes
a few presentation-oriented projections (``evidence_summary``,
``frequency_hz_or_order``, ``amplitude_metric``, and the confidence label
fields) alongside the domain-owned finding data.
FindingPayload.title: FindingPayload

get.description: Return all available car manufacturer brands from the library.
Return library entries for *brand* + *type*; 404 if the combination is unknown.

parameters.description: Vehicle body type to look up for the selected brand.
parameters.name: type

schema.description: Vehicle body type to look up for the selected brand.
schema.title: Type

404.description: The requested brand or brand/type combination does not exist.

get.description: Return body types available for *brand*; 404 if the brand is unknown.

404.description: The requested brand or brand/type combination does not exist.

get.description: List the supported sensor location codes that operators can assign to clients.
List known sensor clients with live connection state and latest computed metrics.

delete.description: Remove a disconnected sensor from the runtime registry.

post.description: Send a temporary identify/blink command so an operator can find a sensor physically.

503.description: Sensor is known but not currently reachable.

post.description: Assign or clear the logical location for a sensor and persist the updated mapping.

400.description: Invalid sensor identifier or unknown location code.

409.description: Requested location is already assigned to another sensor.

post.description: Request cancellation of the active ESP32 flash job.

get.description: List completed and failed ESP32 flash attempts kept in local history.
Return incremental ESP32 flash logs for polling clients.

parameters.description: Return log lines strictly after this zero-based index.
parameters.name: after

schema.description: Return log lines strictly after this zero-based index.
schema.title: After

get.description: List serial ports currently available for ESP32 firmware flashing.

post.description: Start a new ESP32 firmware flash job with either auto-detect or an explicit port.

400.description: Invalid flash settings or port selection.

409.description: An ESP flash job is already running.

500.description: The flash job could not be started.

get.description: Return the current ESP32 flash job state and the selected serial port, if any.
Return the current runtime health snapshot for the server and sensor pipeline.
List all persisted recording runs available in history storage.

delete.description: Delete a persisted run and its derived artifacts from history storage.

get.description: Return full metadata and analysis payloads for a single recorded run.

500.description: Run data is corrupt or could not be processed.

get.description: Build and stream the ZIP export bundle for a persisted run.

500.description: Export generation failed because the run data is corrupt or incomplete.

get.description: Return localized post-analysis findings, or a 202 while analysis is still running.

parameters.description: Optional language override for localized insights text (for example 'en' or 'nl').
parameters.name: lang

schema.description: Optional language override for localized insights text (for example 'en' or 'nl').
schema.title: Lang

202.description: Analysis is still running for the requested run.

409.description: Insights are not ready yet for the requested run.

422.description: Insights are unavailable because analysis failed or produced unsupported persisted data.

500.description: Run data is corrupt or insights generation failed.

get.description: Build and download the PDF diagnostic report for a persisted run.

parameters.description: Optional language override for the generated PDF report (for example 'en' or 'nl').
parameters.name: lang

schema.description: Optional language override for the generated PDF report (for example 'en' or 'nl').
schema.title: Lang

500.description: Report generation failed because the run data is corrupt or incomplete.

post.description: Start recording a new run and return the updated recorder status snapshot.

get.description: Return the current recording state, counters, and last completed run details.

post.description: Stop the active recording and return the updated recorder status snapshot.

get.description: Return the validated analysis settings derived from the active car profile.

put.description: Update analysis-specific car aspects such as tire geometry and drivetrain ratios.

400.description: Analysis settings are invalid or no active car is configured.

get.description: List all saved car profiles together with the currently active car ID.

post.description: Create a new car profile from the provided partial settings payload.

put.description: Select which saved car profile should drive current analysis settings.

404.description: Requested car profile was not found.

delete.description: Delete a saved car profile when that removal keeps settings state valid.

400.description: Invalid car identifier or the requested deletion violates current settings constraints.

404.description: Requested car profile was not found.

put.description: Update an existing car profile while preserving unspecified fields.

404.description: Requested car profile was not found.

get.description: Return the currently selected dashboard language code.

put.description: Update the dashboard language used by the local UI.

post.description: Pair, trust, connect, and persist the selected Bluetooth OBD adapter.

503.description: Bluetooth OBD helper unavailable or the requested action failed.

post.description: Scan nearby Bluetooth OBD adapters using the privileged helper.

503.description: Bluetooth OBD helper unavailable or the requested action failed.

get.description: Return detailed Bluetooth OBD runtime/admin status for diagnostics.
Return the persisted speed-source configuration used for order tracking.

put.description: Update the preferred speed source, manual fallback speed, and staleness timeout.

400.description: The requested speed-source configuration is invalid.

get.description: Return the live selected-speed-source connection state and effective speed status.
Return the speed unit currently used for UI display and input.

put.description: Update the speed unit used for UI display and manual speed entry.

post.description: Request cancellation of the active OTA software update job.

get.description: Return the current USB internet detection and usability snapshot.

post.description: Start an OTA software update using the supplied uplink Wi-Fi credentials.

400.description: Invalid Wi-Fi credentials or update request values.

409.description: An update job is already running.

500.description: The update process could not be started.

get.description: Return the current OTA software update job state, logs, and runtime details.
